product_names: Healthy Has Never Tasted So Good
notes: Imported from competitor Meta Ad Library scraper

cards.body: Grüns Superfood Gummies make daily nutrition easy and delicious. Made with 20+ vitamins, minerals, and prebiotics, they support energy and gut health in a soft, chewable gummy with a juicy strawberry flavor you’ll actually enjoy.
